name: Rajan Gupta
tagline: Building AI products with engineering rigor.
subtitle: AI Product Manager specializing in LLM evaluation, system reliability, and cost optimization.
supportingBody: 15+ years across banking, enterprise SaaS, and public sector - applying performance engineering rigor to AI-powered products.
currentRole: Performance Test Lead · Bank of Montreal
aboutParagraphs: I lead performance and product initiatives at Bank of Montreal, where I'm migrating on-premise services to AWS Lambda — improving deployment speed by 40% and optimizing latency-cost trade-offs. Previously, I delivered 663% revenue growth at MTX Group ($157K → $1.2M in 14 months) and led product roadmaps for Bank of America's CashPro Mobile, improving user retention by 7%.

My 15+ years in Performance Engineering and Quality Assurance translates directly into AI Product Management: I've spent my career testing & engineering applications, finding bottlenecks, auditing edge cases, and managing trade-offs between latency, accuracy, and cost - the exact problems LLM-powered products face in 2026.
I use a modern AI-powered PM stack — Claude AI for research synthesis, Google AI Studio for rapid prototyping, n8n for workflow automation

capabilities.title: System Reliability
capabilities.description: Audit failure modes, edge cases, and prompt injection vulnerabilities.

capabilities.title: Cost Optimization
capabilities.description: Manage trade-offs between latency, accuracy, and token economics.

capabilities.title: Product Strategy
capabilities.description: Translate user research into AI-native product roadmaps and measurable outcomes.
